name: Mimcemeat Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 9 ounces of mincemeat, 3 tablespoons of sugar, and 1 cup of water in a saucepan.
2. Cook the mixture over medium heat for about 3 minutes until it thickens slightly.
3. Stir in 1/2 cup of ground nuts until well combined.
4. Use the prepared mixture to make sandwiches with cream cheese as desired.
